display.purpose: Page titles and primary landing statements. Keep fast and readable.

body.purpose: Short descriptions, game summaries, and support copy with 65 to 75ch line length.

label.purpose: Filters, badges, counts, and compact state text.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Current low elevation for header, panels, and content cards.

shadows.name: ambient-high
shadows.purpose: Major game containers and active hover states only.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Buttons, chips, and link state changes.

motion.name: duration-card
motion.purpose: Game card lift and thumbnail treatments.

rules: Every new accent color needs a category, state, or action role.
Avoid casino, preschool, and dark esports cues.
Playfulness must preserve readability and trust.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for browsing and opening games.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #007AFF; color: #FFFFFF; border: 0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; font: 600 16px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0057B8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #B8D9FF; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Game Card
components.description: Thumbnail-led card for game discovery grids.
components.css: .ds-game-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #1C1C1E; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); transition: transform 260ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), box-shadow 260ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-game-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); } .ds-game-card h3 { margin: 12px 14px 16px; font: 600 20px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-thumb { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; background: #F2F2F7; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Compact filter control for category browsing.
components.css: .ds-chip { border: 2px solid #F2F2F7; background: #FFFFFF; color: #1C1C1E; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 16px; font: 600 14px/1.2 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-chip.is-active { border-color: #007AFF; background: #E8F2FF; color: #0057B8; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #B8D9FF; outline-offset: 2px; }
